as a standard retail pharmacy within a split 
network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DAYS_INPP_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INPP are currently referred 
to as preferred pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the meaning of the variable, 
and the data values are the same over time.
